zh.lifeSummary: 當Eschyna de Londiis de Molle於1107年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利時，她的父親Thomas de Loudon27歲，母親Escheyne Molle23歲。她於1127年之前與Walter Fitz Alan 1st High Steward of Scotland在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1186年在她的家鄉享年79歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eschyna de Londiis de Molle于1107年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利时，她的父亲Thomas de Loudon27岁，母亲Escheyne Molle23岁。她于1127年之前与Walter Fitz Alan 1st High Steward of Scotland在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1186年在她的家乡享年79岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Molle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cecile, Emile, Jacques, Sylvain.
French: topographic name from a diminutive of mol, mou ‘soft’, denoting boggy ground.

variants.name: Mollet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Jean Claude.
French and Swiss French: topographic name for someone who lived in a muddy or boggy place, from a diminutive of mol ‘marsh, bog’ (compare Molle ). This surname is also found in Germany.

variants.name: Mole
meanings: French: metonymic occupational name for a knife grinder or a maker of whetstones, from a variant of meule ‘whetstone, grindstone, millstone’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Eschyna de Londiis de Molle was born in 1107, in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, her father, Thomas de Loudon, was 27 and her mother, Escheyne Molle, was 23. She married Walter Fitz Alan 1st High Steward of Scotland before 1127, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1186, in her hometown, at the age of 79, and was buried in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eschyna de Londiis de Molle est née en 1107, à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Thomas de Loudon, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Escheyne Molle, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Fitz Alan 1st High Steward of Scotland avant 1127, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1186, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eschyna de Londiis de Molle 1107 in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Loudon 27 und ihre Mutter Escheyne Molle 23. Sie hat vor 1127 in England Walter Fitz Alan 1st High Steward of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1186 im Alter von 79 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eschyna de Londiis de Molle è nata il nel 1107 nel Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, sua padre, Thomas de Loudon, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Escheyne Molle, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Walter Fitz Alan 1st High Steward of Scotland prima del 1127, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1186, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Eschyna de Londiis de Molleが1107年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーで生まれた時，父Thomas de Loudonは27歳，母Escheyne Molleは23歳であった。1127年以前にイギリスでWalter Fitz Alan 1st High Steward of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1186年に故郷で79歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーペイスリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Paisley Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Eschyna de Londiis de Molle(이)가 1107년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Loudon(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Escheyne Molle(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1127년 이전 영국에서 Walter Fitz Alan 1st High Steward of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1186년 그녀의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eschyna de Londiis de Molle nasceu em 1107, em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Thomas de Loudon, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Escheyne Molle, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Fitz Alan 1st High Steward of Scotland antes 1127, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1186, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.Paisley Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland: пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eschyna de Londiis de Molle родилась в 1107 г. в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Loudon было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Escheyne Molle, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Fitz Alan 1st High Steward of Scotland перед 1127 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1186 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Walter Fitz Alan 1st High Steward of Scotland antes de 1127, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas.
